name: Consensus Signal with Widened Trade Flow Filter
hypothesis: The parent spec suffered from a statistically insignificant sample size. To address this, the `zscore(trade_imbalance_signed)` filter is loosened dramatically from `> 0.5` to `> 0.1`, effectively requiring only a minimal positive trade flow confirmation. This will generate a larger sample to properly evaluate the core consensus hypothesis.
mutation_note: Aggressively loosened the trade imbalance z-score threshold from 0.5 to 0.1 to increase sample size, as per feedback.
